MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JILL BATES-MOORE, Tel No. (510) 985-9250 specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LEONARDO FLORERO'S Motion To Strike And Tax Costs and Request For OSC Re Sanctions is taken off calendar. The Court did not receive courtesy copies of the moving papers in violation of SF Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
